title: How traders easily get fooled
author: Am4nnnn
selftext:
A lot of retail traders are about to find out the hard way that “the LLM made the trade” isn’t a strategy, and TradingAgents hitting #1 on GitHub last week with a Sharpe of 5.6 in backtest is going to teach that lesson on live accounts.

LLMs are non deterministic by design, so the moment you rerun the backtest you get a different equity curve from the same prompt and the same data.

An edge you can’t reproduce isn’t an edge, it’s a coincidence with a Sharpe ratio, and everything else is autocomplete with leverage.

comments.author: superted_swe
comments.body: Also, LLM have been trained on future data, from a backtesting perspective, rendering this useless more or less

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body:
